title: Rich Tender Chinese Pecan Stew
description: A hearty, halal-friendly Chinese stew brimming with tender chicken and crunchy pecans, simmered in a savory soy and ginger broth that warms the soul.
instructions: Heat 1 tsp sesame oil in a large pot over medium. Add diced chicken, season with salt and pepper, sear until browned, set aside.
Add remaining 1 tsp oil, sauté sliced onion until translucent.
Add minced garlic and ginger, cook 30 seconds until fragrant.
Pour in Shaoxing wine, deglaze, scraping brown bits from the pan.
Add chicken broth and soy sauce, bring to a simmer.
Return chicken to the pot, add half of the toasted pecans, simmer 10 minutes until chicken is tender.
Stir in remaining pecans, simmer 5 more minutes.
Whisk cornstarch and water until smooth, slowly pour into pot, stir to thicken, cook 2 minutes.
Taste and adjust seasoning with pepper, add scallions, remove from heat.
Serve hot over steamed rice or noodles.
